rationale.R1.1: The agent identified the core conceptual issue of competing contributions and proposed a clear reframing, demonstrating a strong understanding of the load-bearing concept.
rationale.R1.5: The agent provided a detailed and coherent structural reorganization plan with per-section rationale, meeting the highest standard for this dimension.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged several uncertainties but did not consistently mark confidence levels for each recommendation, partially meeting the criteria.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to the scope with only minor deviations, indicating good but not perfect scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: The agent successfully identified harmful patterns and suggested corrections, fully avoiding downstream harms.
rationale.RX.5: While major rewrites were traced, minor edits lacked traceability, leading to a partial score.
